brand.name: Madar
brand.tagline: Run your shop the way it should run.

selectPlan.title: Pick a plan to start
selectPlan.subtitle: Your shop is created. Choose the plan that fits your business — you can change it later.
selectPlan.emptyBody: Your platform administrator hasn't published any plans yet. Please contact them — once a plan is available you'll be able to continue here.

errors.network: Something went wrong saving your choice. Please try again.
errors.planNotFound: That plan no longer exists. Please pick another.
errors.planInactive: That plan isn't available. Please pick another.
errors.planAlreadyAssigned: Your shop already has a plan. Reloading…

offline.title: You're offline
offline.body: We can't reach the server right now. You can still ring up sales from the POS — they'll sync when you're back online.

install.title: Install Madar
install.body: Add Madar to your home screen for one-tap launch and faster offline access.

center.title: Reports center
center.subtitle: Drill into your revenue, margin, and tax — by period, branch, category, or SKU.

pnl.title: Profit & loss
pnl.body: Revenue minus discounts, tax, COGS and refunds.

movers.title: Top movers & margin
movers.body: Best and slow movers by revenue, units, or profit.

tax.title: Tax report
tax.body: Taxable sales and tax collected, by tax class.

scheduled.title: Scheduled reports
scheduled.body: Email a report to your inbox on a cadence.

pnl.title: Profit & Loss
pnl.subtitle: Revenue minus discounts, tax, COGS, and refunds — the bottom line for any window you pick.
pnl.mixedCurrencyWarning: Your branches use more than one currency. Totals are limited to the currency you selected — pick another to see the rest.

csv.error: We couldn't generate the CSV. Try again in a moment.

empty.title: Nothing to report yet
empty.body: No sales fell inside this window. Adjust the dates or filters and try again.

error.title: We couldn't load the report
error.body: The report service is temporarily unavailable.

errors.forbidden_role: You don't have permission to view financial reports.
errors.validation_failed: Some filters aren't valid — double-check the date range and currency code.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while generating the report.

movers.title: Top movers
movers.subtitle: Ranked products with 7-day momentum, margin, and slow-stock alerts.

slowMovers.title: Slow movers
slowMovers.body: In stock, but barely selling in this window.

empty.title: No sales yet
empty.body: Once paid sales land in this window, your top movers appear here.

error.title: Couldn't load movers
error.body: We hit a problem fetching this report. Retry or come back shortly.

errors.forbidden_role: Your role can't view margin reports.

trends.title: Trend analysis
trends.subtitle: Rolling-window time series with peak and trough call-outs.
trends.chartAria: Trend chart with rolling average and optional overlay

empty.title: No activity yet
empty.body: Once sales begin posting to this branch, the trend will populate here.

error.title: Couldn't load the trend
error.body: We hit a problem fetching the series. Try again in a moment.

errors.forbidden_role: Your role can't open this report.

tax.title: Tax report
tax.subtitle: Taxable sales and tax collected, grouped by tax class.

empty.title: No taxable sales in this period
empty.body: Sales completed in the selected window will appear here grouped by tax class.

error.title: Couldn't load the report
error.body: The tax report query failed. Try again or narrow the period.

errors.forbidden_role: You do not have permission to view the tax report.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while loading the tax report.

scheduled.title: Scheduled reports
scheduled.subtitle: Send your P&L, tax, and trend reports to inboxes on a schedule.

fields.name: Name
fields.recipientsHint: Press Enter or comma to add. Up to 20 addresses.

scheduled.runNowToast: Queued — recipients should receive it shortly.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this schedule?
deleteConfirm.body: Future runs will stop and recipients will no longer receive this report.

empty.title: No schedules yet
empty.body: Set up your first scheduled report to keep stakeholders in the loop without lifting a finger.

error.title: Couldn't load schedules
error.body: The server didn't respond. Try again in a moment.

errors.forbidden_role: You don't have permission to manage scheduled reports.

salesConflicts.title: Sync conflicts
salesConflicts.subtitle: Sales that need manager review — typically caused by offline-ringing past available stock.

empty.title: No conflicts
empty.body: Nothing to review right now. Offline-ringing past available stock or other sync issues will appear here.

error.title: Couldn't load conflicts
error.body: We hit a snag fetching the conflict queue.

errors.not_resolvable: This conflict has already been reviewed.
errors.forbidden_role: Only owners, managers, and auditors can view conflicts.

shell.brandHeadline: Run your shop the way it should run.
shell.brandTagline: Madar is the calm, bilingual point of sale for retailers, restaurants, and pharmacies — built on transparency.

errors.inactive: This account is disabled. Contact your owner.
errors.tenant_inactive: Your shop is not currently active.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again in a minute.
errors.validation_failed: Please check the fields and try again.

signup.title: Open your Madar shop
signup.subtitle: 14-day free trial. No card.
signup.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

errors.email_taken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Use 8+ characters with a letter and a number.
errors.rate_limited: Too many signups from this network — try again later.
errors.validation_failed: Please check the fields and try again.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email you use to sign in. We'll send a link to reset.
forgot.successBody: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way. It expires in 1 hour.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Pick something fresh — at least 8 characters with a letter and a number.
reset.successBody: You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.invalid_token: This reset link is invalid or has been used already.
errors.reset_token_expired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.weak_password: Use 8+ characters with a letter and a number.
errors.validation_failed: Please check the fields and try again.

verify.successBody: Thanks — your account is now confirmed.
verify.expiredBody: Verification links last 24 hours. Enter your email below to get a fresh one.
verify.invalidBody: We couldn't verify with that link. It may already be used.

errors.mfa_pending_invalid: Your session expired. Sign in again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again in a minute.

enroll.title: Set up two-factor authentication
enroll.intro: Use an authenticator app like 1Password, Authy, or Google Authenticator.
enroll.step1Body: Add Madar to your authenticator. If you can't scan, enter the key manually.
enroll.step2Body: Your app will show a code that rotates every 30 seconds.
enroll.step3Body: Each code works once if you lose access to your authenticator. Print or store them somewhere safe.

errors.enroll_expired: Setup expired. Start again from Settings.

disable.title: Turn off two-factor authentication
disable.body: Confirm your password to disable two-factor sign-in. We strongly recommend keeping it on.

regenerate.title: Generate new recovery codes
regenerate.body: Re-entering your password creates a fresh set of single-use codes. Your old codes stop working immediately.
regenerate.codesIntro: Store these in a password manager — they're shown once and replace any codes from before.
regenerate.codesWarning: Any previously saved codes are now invalid.

home.headline: Madar
home.subhead: Multi-branch point of sale for specialty retail.
home.previewNote: Phase 1 preview — POS Sell Screen with mock data.

taxClass.label: Tax class
taxClass.hint: Leave on default to inherit the shop's default tax class.

empty.title: No products yet
empty.body: Add your first SKU to start tracking catalog and stock. You can import in bulk or add them one at a time.

error.title: Couldn't load your catalog
error.body: The server didn't respond. Check your connection or try again.

ai.headline: 3 SKUs will run out within 7 days. Madar suggests reordering Yirgacheffe (120), Kenya AA (60), and Geisha (24) — bundled into one PO with Sidamo Direct.

printLabels.title: {count, plural, one {# label} other {# labels}} ready to print
printLabels.hint: Press Ctrl/⌘+P or use the Print button. Tip: in the browser print dialog turn on "Background graphics" for accurate colors.

editPriceModal.title: Edit price for selected
editPriceModal.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# product} other {# products}} selected

errors.partial: {failed} of {total} updates failed. Refresh to confirm what saved.
errors.impersonating: Bulk edits are blocked during impersonation.

adjustStockModal.title: Adjust stock for selected
adjustStockModal.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# product} other {# products}} selected · same delta applied to each

errors.noteRequired: A reason is required so the ledger stays auditable.
errors.negativeStock: "{name}" would go below zero. Lower the delta or split the batch.

row.confirmDelete: Delete "{name}"? It will be hidden from the catalog and POS.

form.createSubtitle: Add a SKU to your catalog. Both English and Arabic names are required.
form.editSubtitle: Update product details. Stock changes use the bulk Adjust stock action.

sections.initialStockSubtitle: Optional — seed on-hand quantities and reorder points per branch. You can do this later from each branch.

initialStock.emptyHint: No initial stock yet. Add a branch row to seed on-hand quantities.

errors.skuFormat: Use uppercase letters, digits, and dashes only

image.hint: JPG, PNG, or WEBP · up to 5 MB · resized + EXIF stripped server-side
image.tooLarge: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.

overview.noDescription: No description yet — add one to help cashiers and customers.

stock.empty: No branch stock yet. Stock is added per-branch on product creation or via stock movements.
stock.movementsEmpty: No movements yet. Sales, transfers, and adjustments will appear here.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.empty: No activity recorded for this product yet.

movements.title: Stock movements
movements.subtitle: Every ledger entry across branches, in order.
movements.emptyBody: Widen the date range or change the filters.

import.title: Import products from CSV
import.subtitle: Upsert by SKU. Existing SKUs are updated; new SKUs are created. Max 2MB / 5000 rows.

tree.label: Category tree
tree.countLabel: {count, plural, =0 {no products} one {# product} other {# products}}

panel.label: Selected category
panel.empty: Select a category to view details.

confirmDelete.title: Delete category?
confirmDelete.body: Delete "{name}"? This can't be undone. Categories that still have products attached cannot be deleted.

errors.codeFormat: Letters, numbers, underscore and dash only.
errors.codeTaken: A category with this code already exists.
errors.selfParent: A category can't be its own parent.
errors.inUse: This category still has products. Move or delete them first.

billing.title: Plan & billing
billing.subtitle: Bank transfer · manual verification by our finance team for {tenant}

errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load billing details. Check your connection and try again.

trial.headline: Trial ends in {days} days
trial.body: Start your subscription by paying your first invoice. You'll keep everything you've configured.

history.empty: No payments yet — your history will show up here once invoices are paid.
history.receiptsNote: Downloadable PDF receipts are coming soon.

step1.heading: Send {amount} by bank transfer
step1.body: Transfer to one of our platform accounts. Include the reference code in your transfer memo so verification is fast.
step1.noBanks: No bank accounts available for your currency yet. Contact support.

step2.heading: Upload your transfer receipt
step2.upload: Click or drop a PDF / JPG / PNG here

step3.heading: Your payment is being verified
step3.body: Receipt for {amount} on {ref} received. Our finance team verifies within 24h. You keep full access in the meantime.

bank.qrHint: Scan with your phone camera to copy the bank, reference, and amount.

reference.label: Reference code · must be in transfer memo
reference.note: Without the reference, manual verification can take 24–48h longer.

errors.fileRequired: Please attach a receipt file before submitting.

loading.title: Loading your dashboard…
loading.body: Pulling this week's numbers from across your branches.

error.title: Couldn't load your dashboard.
error.body: Something went wrong reaching the server. Check your connection and try again.

dashboard.mixedCurrencyWarning: Some of this week's sales were in a different currency. Revenue totals show your default currency only; transactions include all currencies.

headline.firstWeek: Your first week of insights. Make a few sales to populate this dashboard.

hero.title: Revenue · last 30 days
hero.empty: No sales recorded in the last 30 days.

heatmap.title: When customers buy
heatmap.body: Each cell is one hour × one weekday over the last 4 weeks. Darker = busier. Use this to spot a soft afternoon or a missed morning rush.

banner.trialEndingBody: Your trial ends in {days, plural, =0 {today} one {1 day} other {# days}}. Pay your first invoice to keep selling.
banner.graceBody: Subscription payment is overdue. You can keep working — pay before access pauses.
banner.suspendedBody: Read-only until the outstanding invoice is paid.
banner.cancelledBody: Export your data within the retention window.

shifts.listSubtitle: Open cashier sessions and end-of-day reconciliation.
shifts.emptyBody: Open the POS to start the day — sales attach to whichever shift is currently open.
shifts.notFoundBody: This shift may have been deleted, or never existed.

shift.openRequired: Open a shift to start ringing sales.

open.title: Open shift
open.subtitle: Set your opening cash float so end-of-shift reconciliation matches.

close.title: End shift
close.subtitle: Count the drawer cash. The variance shows over or under.

errors.alreadyOpen: You already have an open shift. Close it before opening another.
errors.forbiddenBranch: You can only open a shift at your assigned branch.
errors.forbiddenRole: Your role can't end this shift.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

customerPicker.title: Attach customer
customerPicker.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, email, or code…
customerPicker.salesCount: {count, plural, =0 {no sales yet} one {# sale} other {# sales}}

header.endShiftConfirm: End shift and sign out? Any held tickets stay saved on this device.

empty.title: Scan or tap a product to start
empty.body: Items appear here as you add them. Press <esc>Esc</esc> to return focus to the scanner.

held.title: Held sales · {count}
held.hoursAgo: {hours, plural, one {# hr ago} other {# hrs ago}}
held.empty: No held sales. Use Hold in the cart to park a ticket for later.
held.heldToast: Ticket saved. Recall it from the Held tray.
held.resumeError: Couldn't recall that ticket — it may have already been resumed elsewhere.
held.listError: Couldn't sync held tickets. Check your connection.

discardConfirm.body: Discard this held ticket? This can't be undone.

offline.statusOffline: Offline · {count, plural, =0 {no pending} one {1 pending} other {# pending}}
offline.queuedToast: Saved offline. Will sync when back online.
offline.conflictsBanner: {count, plural, one {1 sync conflict needs review} other {# sync conflicts need review}}

payment.bankReceiptBody: Customer paid by bank transfer. Enter the reference number and capture the receipt — a manager will verify it daily.
payment.pendingNotice: This sale will be marked Pending until verified. It appears in Reconciliation; managers verify daily against the bank statement.

upload.invalidType: Receipt must be JPG, PNG, or PDF
upload.fallbackError: Sale was created, but receipt upload failed. Re-upload from Verification.

taxBreakdown.label: Tax
taxBreakdown.inclusiveHint: Tax inclusive — already in the line price.

card.title: Card
card.terminalHint: Read the approval code from the card terminal display and type it exactly. This is a manual entry — no gateway is involved.

errors.remaining_nonzero: Adjust the amounts until the remaining is exactly zero.
errors.min_two_slices: Add at least one more payment to split.
errors.sum_mismatch: Payments don't add up to the total.

storeCredit.title: Store credit
storeCredit.tooltipNeedsCustomer: Attach a customer to use store credit.

errors.insufficient: Customer's credit doesn't cover the total.
errors.customer_required: A customer must be attached to use store credit.
errors.currency_mismatch: Customer credit is in a different currency.

empty.selectProof: Select a proof from the list.

reject.title: Reject this proof
reject.body: Pick a reason. The customer will be notified and can resubmit.
reject.notesPlaceholder: Optional context for the audit log

errors.loadList: Couldn't load the queue. Refresh to retry.
errors.verifyFailed: Couldn't verify proof. Please try again.
errors.rejectFailed: Couldn't reject proof. Please try again.

access.denied: You don't have access to this page
access.deniedBody: Only owners and managers can verify payment proofs. Ask your shop owner if you need access.

empty.title: No branches yet
empty.body: Add your first location to start running registers and tracking stock by branch.

error.title: Couldn't load branches
error.body: The server didn't respond. Check your connection or try again.

fields.codeHint: Short uppercase ID, 2–16 chars. Used in reports and receipts.
fields.isActiveHint: Inactive branches don't appear in the switcher.
fields.geoHint: Optional. Used on the branch map view. Both fields together or neither.

errors.codePattern: Use uppercase letters, digits, underscores, or dashes.
errors.code_taken: A branch with this code already exists.
errors.currency_locked_after_sales: Currency can't change once sales have been recorded.
errors.branch_has_stock: There's still stock at this branch — move or zero it before deleting.
errors.branch_has_users: Reassign staff before deleting this branch.
errors.forbidden_branch: You can only edit your own branch.

overview.usersEmpty: No staff assigned to this branch.

stock.title: Stock at this branch
stock.empty: No stock recorded at this branch yet.
stock.lowEmpty: Nothing is low at this branch.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteHint: You can delete a branch only when no stock or staff are assigned.
settings.deleteConfirm: Delete this branch? This cannot be undone.

hours.title: Operating hours
hours.subtitle: When the doors are open. Used on receipts and the customer-facing landing page.
hours.validationError: Closing time must be after opening time.

holidays.title: Holiday calendar
holidays.subtitle: Days you'll be closed. Surfaces on receipts and the shift schedule.
holidays.validationError: Each holiday needs a date and labels.

banking.title: Receiving accounts
banking.subtitle: Where customers send bank transfers paid at this branch.

charts.topCategoriesEmpty: Nothing sold in the last 7 days.

leaderboard.title: Branch leaderboard (today)
leaderboard.single: You're the only branch right now.

map.missing: No coordinates on this branch yet.
map.missingHint: Add latitude and longitude on the edit page to drop a pin here.

notFound.title: Branch not found
notFound.body: We couldn't find that branch. It may have been removed.

body.draft: Start a transfer when you need to move stock between branches.
body.in_transit: No transfers are en route right now.

error.title: Couldn't load transfers
error.body: The server didn't respond. Try again.

notFound.title: Transfer not found
notFound.body: We couldn't find that transfer. It may have been removed.

step1.title: Select the source and destination branches
step1.sameBranchError: Source and destination must be different.

detail.inTransitBanner: These goods are in transit. Confirm receipt when they arrive.
detail.discrepancyBanner: This transfer arrived with a discrepancy. Adjust stock manually if needed.
detail.receiveHint: Enter the actual quantity received. Any difference will be flagged.
detail.discrepancyPlaceholder: Why the count differs (e.g. damaged, missing)

errors.unknown_product: One of the products no longer exists.
errors.duplicate_product: The same product appears more than once.
errors.transfer_empty: Add at least one line before sending.
errors.transfer_not_receivable: Only in-transit transfers can be received.
errors.transfer_not_deletable: Only drafts or cancelled transfers can be deleted.
errors.incomplete_receive: Every line must be confirmed when receiving.
errors.forbidden_branch: You can only act on transfers involving your assigned branch.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Sign-in and account safety.
security.mfaOn: On — codes from your authenticator are required when you sign in.
security.mfaOff: Off — add a second factor to keep your account safe.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Invite teammates and manage their access. Owner only.

empty.title: No teammates yet
empty.body: Invite your first teammate to share the workload.

error.title: Couldn't load users
error.body: The server didn't respond. Check your connection and try again.

editModal.title: Edit user
editModal.selfNote: You can't edit your own role or access.

resendConfirm.title: Resend invitation?
resendConfirm.body: This emails a fresh invite. The previous link will stop working.

deactivateConfirm.title: Deactivate {name}?
deactivateConfirm.body: {name} will lose access immediately. You can reactivate any time.

reactivateConfirm.title: Reactivate {name}?
reactivateConfirm.body: {name} will regain access. Are you sure?

ownerOnly.title: Owner-only page
ownerOnly.body: Only the tenant owner can manage users.

errors.email_taken: Someone with that email already has access.
errors.manager_requires_branch: Managers must be assigned to a branch.
errors.cannot_edit_self: You can't edit your own role or access.
errors.cannot_resend_self: You can't resend an invite to yourself.
errors.last_owner_lock: There must be at least one active owner.
errors.forbidden_role: Only the owner can manage users.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPasswordConfirm.title: Reset password?
resetPasswordConfirm.body: {name} will receive an email at {email} with a link to set a new password. Their current password keeps working until they use the link.

taxClasses.title: Tax classes
taxClasses.subtitle: Define the VAT, GST, or other tax rates you apply to products. Owner only.
taxClasses.taxRateHint: Enter the rate as a percent (e.g. 15 for 15%). Stored internally as basis points.

empty.title: No tax classes yet
empty.body: Create your first tax class to start applying tax on sales.

error.title: Couldn't load tax classes
error.body: The server didn't respond. Check your connection and try again.

ownerOnly.title: Owner-only page
ownerOnly.body: Only the tenant owner can manage tax classes.

errors.tax_class_code_taken: A tax class with this code already exists.
errors.tax_class_in_use: This tax class can't be deleted — products reference it or it's the default.
errors.forbidden_role: Only the owner can manage tax classes.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your name, email, password, and language.

password.title: Password
password.subtitle: Change your password and sign out of other devices.

security.title: Two-factor authentication
security.disabled: 2FA is off — add it from the Security tab.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.soon: Coming soon — manage email and in-app notifications here.

errors.weak_password: Password is too weak — mix letters, digits, and a symbol.
errors.same_password: New password must differ from the current one.
errors.email_taken: Another user already has this email.
errors.same_email: New email must differ from the current one.

business.title: Business
business.subtitle: Identity, operations, and tax defaults for the whole shop.
business.error: Couldn't load business settings — please retry.

operations.title: Operations
operations.currencyHint: Default for new branches; existing branches keep their own currency.
operations.defaultLocaleHint: Used for new staff invites and system emails. Individual users can still pick their own.

tax.title: Tax defaults
tax.inclusiveHint: When on, the sticker price already includes tax.

errors.invalid_timezone: That timezone isn't recognized — pick from the list.
errors.forbidden_role: Only the owner can edit business settings.

branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: Logo shown on every printed receipt.
branding.hint: JPG / PNG / WebP up to 5 MB. Squareish + transparent background prints best.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Pick which events ping which channel. Defaults to everything on.

low_stock.label: Low stock alerts
low_stock.description: Daily digest when a product hits its reorder point.

invoice_issued.label: New invoice
invoice_issued.description: When a subscription invoice is generated.

invoice_overdue.label: Invoice overdue
invoice_overdue.description: When an unpaid invoice passes its due date.

payment_received.label: Payment received
payment_received.description: When a customer payment lands on a sale.

payment_verified.label: Subscription payment verified
payment_verified.description: When an admin clears your transfer proof.

refund_completed.label: Refund completed
refund_completed.description: When a customer refund is processed.

shift_variance.label: Shift variance
shift_variance.description: When a cashier's Z-report variance exceeds threshold.

sync_failure.label: Offline sync failure
sync_failure.description: When an offline-ringed sale fails to sync.

errors.forbidden_role: Only owners and managers can change notifications.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Your supply network — terms, performance, and what's owed.
suppliers.addSupplierHint: Bring a new partner into your network.

empty.title: No suppliers yet
empty.body: Add your first partner to start placing purchase orders.

error.title: Couldn't load suppliers
error.body: The server didn't respond. Check your connection or try again.

notFound.title: Supplier not found
notFound.body: It may have been removed or you no longer have access.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this supplier?
deleteConfirm.body: The supplier will be archived. Existing purchase orders are preserved. This action can't be undone.

alerts.title: Reliability slipping
alerts.body: {name} is below 80% on fill rate or on-time delivery. Review recent POs and consider alternates.

fields.isActiveHint: Inactive suppliers don't appear in PO creation.

errors.codePattern: Use uppercase letters, digits, underscores, or dashes.
errors.code_taken: A supplier with this code already exists.
errors.forbidden_role: Only owners and managers can do that.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Products you source from this supplier.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Contracts, tax certificates, and bank letters.

purchases.title: Purchase orders
purchases.subtitle: Stock the shelves — order, receive, reconcile.

notFound.title: Purchase order not found
notFound.body: It may have been removed or you no longer have access.

empty.body: Start your first PO to restock from a supplier.

error.title: Couldn't load purchase orders
error.body: The server didn't respond. Check your connection or try again.

editGuard.title: This PO can't be edited
editGuard.body: Only draft purchase orders are editable. Use the receive flow for ordered POs.

step1.title: Choose supplier and branch
step1.expectedAtHint: Defaults to the supplier's lead time when left blank.

step2.title: Add the lines you'd like to order
step2.productPicker: Search products by name or SKU
step2.prefillLoading: Looking for low-stock items in the supplier's catalog…

step3.title: Review and submit
step3.notesPlaceholder: Internal context for your team or the supplier.

receive.title: Receive goods
receive.notePlaceholder: What was the discrepancy? (damaged, short shipped, swap, …)

statusGuard.title: This PO can't be received
statusGuard.body: Only ordered POs can be received. Someone may have already received this one in another tab.

sendDialog.title: Mark as ordered
sendDialog.body: We'll move this PO to the ordered state. Want to email it to {supplier} too?

noEmail.title: No email on file
noEmail.body: This supplier doesn't have a contact email. You can mark the PO as ordered without sending — share the PDF manually later.

errors.duplicate_product: The same product appears more than once.
errors.product_not_in_catalog: This product isn't in the supplier's catalog yet.
errors.forbidden_branch: You don't have access to that branch.
errors.forbidden_role: Only owners and managers can do that.
errors.not_draft: This PO is no longer a draft.
errors.not_ordered: This PO is no longer in the ordered state.
errors.incomplete_receive: Every line needs a received quantity.
errors.purchase_order_locked: This PO is locked and can't be changed.
errors.not_deletable: This PO can't be deleted in its current state.

returns.title: Supplier returns
returns.subtitle: Send goods back to the supplier and reconcile the refund.

notFound.body: It may have been removed or you no longer have access.

empty.body: Start a return when goods need to go back — damage, wrong item, or expired stock.

editGuard.body: Only draft returns are editable. This one has moved on.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this return?
deleteConfirm.body: This will remove the draft permanently.

form.reasonPlaceholder: Short note explaining why these goods are going back.
form.notesPlaceholder: Anything else for your team or the supplier.
form.productPicker: Search products by name or SKU

refundDialog.title: Mark refund received?
refundDialog.body: We'll move {code} to refunded. This is bookkeeping only — no stock will move.
refundDialog.notesPlaceholder: Reference number, payment method, anything worth recording.

errors.duplicate_product: The same product appears more than once.
errors.forbidden_branch: You don't have access to that branch.
errors.forbidden_role: Only owners and managers can do that.
errors.not_draft: This return is no longer a draft.
errors.not_sent: This return is no longer in the sent state.
errors.not_deletable: This return can't be deleted in its current state.

customers.listSubtitle: Your regulars, walk-ins, and loyalty members in one place.
customers.newSubtitle: Capture the basics now — you can fill in more later.
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, email, or code…
customers.errorBody: The server didn't answer. Try again in a moment.
customers.emptyBody: Start by adding your first regular or capturing a walk-in's details.
customers.notFoundBody: This customer may have been deleted or never existed.
customers.confirmDeleteBody: {name} will be removed from your list. This can't be undone.

credit.body: Use the store-credit ledger to top up, refund, or adjust this customer's balance.

sales.emptyBody: Sales attached to this customer will appear here.

form.name: Full name
form.codeHelp: Optional internal reference (uppercase letters, digits, dashes).

errors.codeInvalid: Code may only contain uppercase letters, digits, underscores, and dashes.

errors.emailTaken: Another customer already uses this email.
errors.phoneTaken: Another customer already uses this phone.
errors.hasStoreCredit: This customer has a non-zero store-credit balance. Zero it first, then delete.
errors.impersonationForbidden: Delete is blocked while you're impersonating a tenant.
errors.forbiddenRole: Your role can't perform this action.
errors.validationFailed: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

empty.title: No history yet
empty.body: When this customer earns or spends credit it will appear here.

error.title: Couldn't load store credit
error.body: We hit a snag fetching this customer's balance.

errors.insufficient_balance: That would put the customer's balance below zero.
errors.currency_mismatch: The currency doesn't match this customer's existing credit.
errors.validation_failed: Please fill in all required fields with valid values.
errors.forbidden: Only owners and managers can adjust store credit.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

refunds.title: Refund this sale
refunds.subtitle: Pick lines to refund, choose how to refund, and confirm.

lines.title: Pick lines to refund
lines.subtitle: Quantities are capped at the amount remaining (not already refunded).

method.title: How are you refunding?
method.subtitle: The amount will be returned to the customer using this method.
method.attachedFromSale: Customer attached on the original sale

hints.cash: Cash will be deducted from the drawer.
hints.bank_transfer: Tracked as an obligation; finance reconciles externally.
hints.store_credit: Adds to the customer's store-credit balance.

review.title: Review and confirm
review.subtitle: Once submitted, the refund code is locked and the audit log is written.
review.linesCount: {count, plural, =0 {No items} one {1 item} other {# items}}

errors.not_refundable: This sale is not paid — refund is only possible after payment is confirmed.
errors.fully_refunded: All lines on this sale have already been refunded.
errors.refund_total_mismatch: The amounts don't add up — please retry.
errors.qty_exceeds_remaining: You can't refund more than the remaining qty on a line.
errors.store_credit_requires_customer: Store-credit refunds need a customer attached.
errors.currency_mismatch: Customer store-credit currency does not match this sale.

approval.title: Manager approval required
approval.subtitle: This refund is above the limit for cashiers. Pick an owner or manager who is approving.

salesList.title: Sales history
salesList.subtitle: Filter and review every sale made across your branches.
salesList.emptyBody: Try widening the date range or clearing the filters.

reconcile.title: End-of-day reconciliation
reconcile.subtitle: Chain-wide cash truth across all shifts for the picked date.

branch.shifts: {count, plural, =0 {No shifts} one {1 shift} other {# shifts}}
